prompt: O Banco Central decretou a liquidação do Banco Master?
response:
**Yes, the Central Bank of Brazil (Banco Central do Brasil - BCB) has decreed the extrajudicial liquidation of Banco Master and related entities.**

### Key Timeline and Facts
- **Initial Liquidation (November 18, 2025)**: BCB decreed extrajudicial liquidation of Banco Master S/A and Banco Master de Investimento S/A due to a severe liquidity crisis. This suspended operations, appointed a liquidator to assess credits and sell assets, and triggered Fundo Garantidor de Créditos (FGC) coverage up to insured limits (sources: [1], [7], [9], [10]).
  - Principal shareholder Daniel Vorcaro was arrested by Federal Police on the same day while attempting to flee abroad ([1]).
  - Banco Master Múltiplo S/A entered Regime Especial de Administração Temporária (RAET) to potentially preserve its subsidiary Will Financeira ([2], [3], [4], [5], [6]).

- **Will Financeira (Will Bank) Liquidation (January 21, 2026)**: BCB liquidated this digital bank subsidiary retroactive to November 24, 2025, due to insolvency and ties to Banco Master ([3]).

- **Banco Master Múltiplo Final Liquidation (March 17-18, 2026)**: RAET ended; BCB converted it to extrajudicial liquidation after the administrator's March 12 report confirmed no basis for continuation post-Will liquidation. Operations ceased definitively; asset freezes on controllers/administrators remain, with ongoing investigations ([2], [4], [5], [6]).

- **Other Entities**: Banco Pleno and Pleno DTVM (part of Master group) were also liquidated after being sold ([8]).

### Evidence from Official and Reliable Sources
| Date | Event | Primary Sources |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| Nov 18, 2025 | Liquidation of Banco Master S/A & Investimento; RAET for Múltiplo | BCB official note ([9]), BCB tweet ([7]), BCB FAQ ([10]) |
| Jan 21, 2026 | Will Financeira liquidation | BCB note ([3]) |
| Mar 17-18, 2026 | Múltiplo liquidation ends RAET | BCB announcements ([2], [4], [5], [6]) |

BCB statements emphasize public interest protection, with FGC reimbursing depositors. No operations continue; the process is complete as of March 2026 (all sources from BCB site, major Brazilian outlets like InfoMoney, CNN Brasil, Veja, O Globo). For updates, check [BCB stability page](https://www.bcb.gov.br/estabilidadefinanceira/banco-master-liquidacao).
